nasb.text: For the Lord humbled Judah because of Ahaz king of Israel, for he had brought about a lack of restraint in Judah and was very unfaithful to the Lord.

esv.text: For the Lord humbled Judah because of Ahaz king of Israel, for he had made Judah act sinfully and had been very unfaithful to the Lord.

cnv.text: 因為猶大王亞哈斯在猶大放縱邪惡，大大地冒犯了耶和華，所以耶和華使猶大卑微。

ccb.text: 耶和华使犹大衰微，因为以色列王亚哈斯在犹大肆无忌惮，悖逆耶和华。
